top3.summary: “Important data” is a concept unique to China law. It refers to data relating to specific topics, groups, or regions, or data that reaches a certain level of precision and scale, the tampering, destruction, leakage or illegal acquisition or use of which may directly jeopardize national security, economic operations, social stability, public health or safety. The statutory definition is notoriously broad. Various industry regulators have attempted to provide further guidance through industry-specific classification and grading standards, covering areas such as automotive, civil avia
